We are looking

for a minister.

Full or part-time · Cathcart, Glasgow

Get in touch ↓
⛪ Congregation Cathcart UF, Glasgow
⏱️ Hours Full or part-time
🤝 Denomination United Free Church of Scotland
✉️ Contact Interim Moderator
✋

We Are Seeking a Minister

Cathcart United Free Church is seeking a minister to serve on a full or part-time basis. We are a small, warm and welcoming congregation on the south side of Glasgow, and we would love to find someone who will help us continue to grow together in Christ, serve the community and share Jesus' love.

We are looking for someone who will work with us in:

  • Worship and preaching
  • Pastoral care
  • Community involvement and partnership working
📄

Read our Congregational Profile

Find out more about who we are, what we do, and what we are looking for in a minister. Read the full profile →

—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
📋

Application Process

Anyone seeking a ministry appointment within the United Free Church of Scotland needs to have completed the appropriate application process. Information on this can be obtained from the United Free Church Office:

office@ufcos.org.uk

Visit ufcos.org.uk →
—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
✉️

Get in Touch

If you would like more information or to have a confidential conversation, please contact our Interim Moderator:

Rev John Fulton
InterimModerator@cathcartuf.org.uk

If you would like to visit the congregation before making contact, you are very welcome to join us on a Sunday morning.

Plan a visit →

"How beautiful are the feet of those who preach the good news!"

Romans 10:15
